title: FireForged
description: A simple layer 7 firewall and with Proxy Protocol v2 support
body:
**FireForged** is a layer 7 firewall mod with Proxy Protocol support. **Server Only**

Current Features:

[x] CIDR IP filter  
[x] Proxy Protocol  
[x] HideMotd  

The project is still under development and lacks comprehended software testing. USE WITH CAUTION in production environment.

If you encountered any bug, or needed any new feature, please leave your comment on Github issue tracker
